must_do.full_text:
Today we’re introducing Gemma 4 12B — our latest open model that brings advanced agentic reasoning, vision and audio directly to your laptop.

It delivers performance nearing our larger Gemma models with a much smaller total memory footprint, while being small enough to run https://t.co/M5xw74tEAW

media.ext_alt_text: Promotional graphic on a black background featuring the large blue text "Gemma 4 12B" above smaller white text that reads "Unified Transformer." A glowing blue ribbon containing multi-modal icons (representing images, text, and audio) flows from the left into a central point, branching out into a complex, luminous blue neural network map on the right.

must_do.summary: Google发布Gemma 4 12B开源模型，支持推理、视觉、音频，可在笔记本运行。单产品技术发布，信息差强。
angles: Google Gemma 4发布：笔记本也能跑多模态AI
12B参数性能逼近大模型，本地化AI时代来临
开源模型新标杆：推理+视觉+音频三合一

must_do.full_text:
Microsoft has unveiled Scout, a next-generation AI agent that turns Copilot into a persistent assistant for Windows 11.

Unlike traditional AI assistants that only respond when asked, Scout runs continuously in the background and maintains context across multiple apps. https://t.co/j88DIgCWfk

angles: 微软Scout：AI助手终于可以后台常驻了

priority.full_text:

その点、リーマンショック時に倒産すら囁かれた苦境下でもアリババを手放さなかったSBGは改めて凄いと思うね。

priority.full_text:
We've changed the trigger word from "workflow" to "ultracode".

You can still say "use a workflow for this", but when you're clearly referring to something else, Claude won't kick off a dynamic workflow. For an explicit trigger, use "ultracode". We appreciate the feedback!
priority.summary: Claude官方宣布将触发词从"workflow"改为"ultracode"，优化动态工作流识别。开发者向产品反馈的迭代更新。
angles: Claude更新触发词：从workflow到ultracode的优化逻辑
开发者呼声被听见，Claude官方迭代工作流识别
一个词的改变，让AI理解你的真实意图
